MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin.; Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee ; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:

Plaintiff JAN CHERNOFF, is present. Represented by
Attorney STEVEN ADAIR MACDONALD, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant PATRISHA VESTEY is present.
Attorney AARON FARMER, representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem MARK SCHREIBER, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of MAY 9, 2011 is vacated.
